morning.title: OpenAI plans to overhaul ChatGPT in the coming weeks, turning it into a superapp with coding tools and AI agents
morning.summary: OpenAI is transforming ChatGPT into a superapp with coding tools and AI agents to serve as a gateway to higher-margin products.

morning.title: IBM acquires Red Hat
morning.summary: IBM acquired Red Hat to create a leading hybrid cloud provider.

morning.title: Memory chip vendors say CXMT's DDR5 prices match Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron
morning.summary: CXMT's DDR5 prices match those of major memory chip vendors like Samsung, SK Hynix, and Micron.

morning.title: Q&A with Google DeepMind's Director of AGI Economics Alex Imas and Epoch AI's Phil Trammell
morning.summary: Alex Imas and Phil Trammell discuss what remains scarce after AGI, redistributing AI wealth, and more in a Q&A session.

morning.title: Scientists ejected from diabetes conference for distributing journal reprints
morning.summary: Scientists were ejected from a diabetes conference for distributing journal reprints, highlighting issues with academic publishing and accessibility.

morning.title: The Meta hack shows there’s more to AI security than Mythos
morning.summary: The Meta hack demonstrates that AI security extends beyond Mythos, requiring a more comprehensive approach to mitigate risks.

morning.title: ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet applauds the EU's tech sovereignty plans
morning.summary: ASML CEO Christophe Fouquet supports the EU's tech sovereignty plans but expresses concerns about substantial EU involvement in strategic projects.

morning.title: Industry data: India's six largest IT companies grew combined revenue from $95.9B in FY23 to $103.1B in FY26
morning.summary: India's six largest IT companies saw a combined revenue growth from $95.9B in FY23 to $103.1B in FY26, with a steady headcount of approximately 1.9M.

morning.title: OpenAI unveils Lockdown Mode to protect sensitive data from prompt injection attacks
morning.summary: OpenAI introduced Lockdown Mode to safeguard sensitive data from prompt injection attacks, enhancing the security of its AI models.

morning.title: Microsoft AI chief says company was “set free” from OpenAI to pursue superintelligence
morning.summary: Microsoft's AI chief believes the company is now free to pursue superintelligence after parting ways with OpenAI.

gym.title: The Power of Real Optimism
gym.summary: Dr. Deepika Chopra discusses the power of real optimism and its impact on our lives.

gym.title: Building Interactive UIs in VS Code with MCP Apps
gym.summary: Marlene Mhangami and Liam Hampton demonstrate how to build interactive UIs in VS Code using MCP Apps.

gym.title: How to Disagree Better
gym.summary: Julia Minson shares insights on how to disagree better and improve our relationships.

gym.title: How to Fix Inauthentic Content Before You Start Losing Viewers
gym.summary: The Science of Scaling provides tips on how to fix inauthentic content and prevent losing viewers.

gym.title: Beyond Belief
gym.summary: Nir Eyal discusses the concept of 'Beyond Belief' and its implications on our lives.
